summary: Comprehensive auth testing for myunionpay-test.it login fixes. All backend auth tests pass (17/17). Frontend login flow works correctly. Minor issue with error message display in UI.

ui_bugs.issue: Error toast shows generic 'Errore del server' instead of specific backend error message (e.g., 'password errata' or 'utente non trovato'). Backend returns correct detail but frontend api.js may have parsing issue when service worker is active.

action_items: MINOR: Investigate frontend api.js error parsing when service worker is active - currently shows 'Errore del server' instead of specific error detail
critical_code_review_comments: Backend auth fixes are solid: case-insensitive email (regex), email trimming, specific error messages all work correctly
Seed script correctly preserves non-seed user passwords (only updates SEED_EMAILS list)
Diagnostic endpoints (verify-login-test, debug-users) are helpful for debugging

success_rate.frontend: 90% (login works, error display has minor issue)

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed users for registration tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth fixes verified working: 1) Case-insensitive email login (TEST@TEST.COM works), 2) Email trimming (' test@test.com ' works), 3) Backend error messages correct ('password errata', 'utente non trovato'), 4) Seed script only updates SEED_EMAILS list (verified all 21 users have valid bcrypt hashes), 5) Diagnostic endpoints working. Frontend login flow works correctly when service worker doesn't interfere.

verified_features.POST /api/auth/register + login new user: PASS - Can register and immediately login
verified_features.GET /api/auth/debug-users: PASS - All 21 users have valid bcrypt hashes
verified_features.Frontend login flow: PASS - Login form works, redirects to dashboard
verified_features.Frontend dashboard: PASS - Shows user 'Mario', balance 130.00 UP, gift cards
